Aymen Dahmen.bio: A young and talented goalkeeper who has established himself as Tunisia's first-choice shot-stopper. His performances in Ligue 1 with Montpellier have demonstrated his ability to compete at a high level in European football.
Aymen Dahmen.playingStyle: Athletic goalkeeper with sharp reflexes, good shot-stopping ability, and the composure to organize the defense in high-pressure situations
keyStrengths: Distribution and playing out from the back
Aymen Dahmen.worldCup2026Role: Starting goalkeeper whose Ligue 1 experience and athletic ability make him the clear first choice; his youth means he is approaching his peak years at the perfect time for the tournament
Aymen Dahmen.notableFact: Has developed into Tunisia's number one goalkeeper while playing in the French Ligue 1 with Montpellier, one of Europe's top leagues

Mouez Hassen.bio: An experienced goalkeeper who also plies his trade in the French league with Montpellier. Hassen's international experience across multiple major tournaments makes him a valuable backup option and dressing-room presence.
Mouez Hassen.playingStyle: Experienced goalkeeper with good positioning, reliable handling, and the big-game experience gained from representing Tunisia at major tournaments
Mouez Hassen.worldCup2026Role: Experienced backup goalkeeper who provides quality depth and tournament know-how; his familiarity with Dahmen from their time together at Montpellier ensures a cohesive goalkeeping unit
Mouez Hassen.notableFact: Has represented Tunisia at multiple international tournaments, giving him invaluable experience in the high-pressure environment of global competitions

Béchir Ben Saïd.bio: A domestic-based goalkeeper from US Monastir who provides depth to Tunisia's goalkeeping ranks. His consistent performances in the Tunisian league have earned him his international recognition.
Béchir Ben Saïd.playingStyle: Solid goalkeeper with good command of the box, dependable shot-stopping, and the consistency that comes from regular domestic football
Béchir Ben Saïd.worldCup2026Role: Third-choice goalkeeper providing squad depth; his inclusion ensures Tunisia have reliable cover across the goalkeeping position
Béchir Ben Saïd.notableFact: Has been a consistent performer in the Tunisian Ligue Professionnelle, earning his place in the national team through steady, reliable performances

Hannibal Mejbri.bio: The most exciting young talent in Tunisian football, Mejbri came through Manchester United's academy and has shown his technical quality and fierce competitive edge. His passionate, combative style and creative ability make him the future of Tunisian football.
Hannibal Mejbri.playingStyle: Creative, combative central midfielder with excellent technical ability, fearless ball-carrying, and a fiery competitive edge that belies his young age
Hannibal Mejbri.worldCup2026Role: Key creative midfielder whose talent and passion make him central to Tunisia's attacking play; his ability to carry the ball and create chances is essential against top opposition
Hannibal Mejbri.notableFact: Developed at Manchester United's academy before moving to Burnley, making him one of the most prominent Tunisian players to train at one of the world's biggest clubs

Ellyes Skhiri.bio: Tunisia's midfield anchor and one of the most accomplished Tunisian players in European football, Skhiri has been a key figure in the Bundesliga with Eintracht Frankfurt. His composure, tactical intelligence, and ball-winning ability make him the most important player in Tunisia's engine room.
Ellyes Skhiri.playingStyle: Complete defensive midfielder with excellent ball-winning ability, clean passing under pressure, and the tactical intelligence to read the game and position himself perfectly
Ellyes Skhiri.worldCup2026Role: Indispensable midfield anchor whose Bundesliga quality sets the standard for the entire team; his ability to win the ball and distribute cleanly is the foundation of Tunisia's play
Ellyes Skhiri.notableFact: Has been one of the most consistent performers in the German Bundesliga with Eintracht Frankfurt, establishing himself among the top defensive midfielders in the league

Aïssa Laïdouni.bio: A dynamic and energetic midfielder who became a fan favorite at the 2022 World Cup with his tireless running and passionate celebrations. Laïdouni's box-to-box energy and intensity in the Bundesliga with Union Berlin make him a crucial part of Tunisia's midfield.
Aïssa Laïdouni.playingStyle: High-energy box-to-box midfielder with relentless pressing, excellent stamina, and the ability to cover every blade of grass while contributing in both attack and defense
Aïssa Laïdouni.worldCup2026Role: Key midfield presence whose energy and intensity set the pressing tone for the whole team; his performances at the 2022 World Cup showed he thrives on the biggest stage
Aïssa Laïdouni.notableFact: Became a breakout star at the 2022 World Cup in Qatar with his passionate performances and tireless running, endearing himself to Tunisian fans worldwide

Youssef Msakni.bio: The most talented Tunisian player of his generation, Msakni is a silky playmaker whose career has been defined by moments of brilliance and unfortunate injury timing. Missing the 2018 World Cup through injury was heartbreaking, making the 2026 tournament potentially his last chance at World Cup football.
Youssef Msakni.playingStyle: Elegant, creative playmaker with sublime technical ability, vision to unlock defenses with a single pass, and the skill to produce moments of individual magic
keyStrengths: Sublime technical ability and ball control
Youssef Msakni.worldCup2026Role: Senior creative influence and national team legend whose experience and skill can unlock the tightest defenses; if fit, his quality is unmatched in the Tunisian squad
Youssef Msakni.notableFact: Missed the 2018 World Cup through injury in what was a devastating blow for both him and Tunisia, as many believe his presence could have changed their tournament fortunes

Montassar Talbi.bio: A tall, commanding center-back who has gained valuable experience in French football with Lorient. Talbi's aerial dominance and improving ball-playing ability have made him a key figure in Tunisia's defense.
Montassar Talbi.playingStyle: Tall, commanding center-back with excellent aerial ability, strong physical presence, and improving comfort on the ball when building from the back
Montassar Talbi.worldCup2026Role: Starting center-back whose aerial ability and physical presence provide the defensive foundation; his experience in French football has prepared him well for World Cup-level attackers
Montassar Talbi.notableFact: Has been a regular in French football with Lorient, developing his game in one of Europe's most competitive leagues

Dylan Bronn.bio: An experienced center-back with a wealth of international experience, Bronn has been a mainstay of the Tunisian defense across multiple tournaments. His left-footed play from the back and set-piece threat from corners and free kicks add extra value.
Dylan Bronn.playingStyle: Left-footed center-back with good passing ability from defense, dangerous from set pieces, and the experience to organize the backline in high-pressure situations
Dylan Bronn.worldCup2026Role: Experienced center-back who provides balance with his left foot and adds a set-piece goal threat; his multiple tournament appearances give him invaluable big-game experience
Dylan Bronn.notableFact: Has represented Tunisia at multiple major tournaments including the World Cup and Africa Cup of Nations, making him one of the most experienced defenders in the squad

Mohamed Ali Ben Romdhane.bio: A creative and technically gifted attacking midfielder who has impressed in European football with Ferencvaros in Hungary. Ben Romdhane's dribbling ability and eye for goal make him an exciting creative force in the Tunisian attack.
Mohamed Ali Ben Romdhane.playingStyle: Creative attacking midfielder with excellent dribbling ability, good vision for the final pass, and the composure to score in important moments
Mohamed Ali Ben Romdhane.worldCup2026Role: Creative attacking option who can unlock defenses with his dribbling and passing; his European experience at Ferencvaros, including Champions League and Europa League exposure, adds pedigree
Mohamed Ali Ben Romdhane.notableFact: Has gained valuable European experience at Ferencvaros, playing in both the Champions League and Europa League qualifying rounds

Ali Abdi.bio: A reliable left-back who has spent his career in French football, most recently with Caen. Abdi's consistency, defensive discipline, and ability to support attacks from the left flank have made him a regular in the Tunisian setup.
Ali Abdi.playingStyle: Consistent, disciplined left-back with good defensive positioning, reliable overlapping ability, and experience in the tactical demands of French football
Ali Abdi.worldCup2026Role: First-choice left-back whose experience and reliability provide stability on the left side of defense; his familiarity with European football prepares him for World Cup challenges
Ali Abdi.notableFact: Has been a dependable performer in French football for several years, building the kind of consistent career that translates well to international tournament football

Mohamed Dräger.bio: A versatile right-back of German-Tunisian heritage who has played across several European leagues. Drager's technical ability, tactical intelligence, and experience in Swiss, German, and Greek football make him a well-rounded defender.
Mohamed Dräger.playingStyle: Technical, attack-minded right-back with good crossing ability, comfortable in possession, and the tactical intelligence gained from playing in multiple European leagues
Mohamed Dräger.worldCup2026Role: Starting right-back whose European experience and attacking quality provide balance on the right flank; his diverse tactical education makes him adaptable to different opponents
Mohamed Dräger.notableFact: Born and raised in Germany before choosing to represent Tunisia, Drager's dual heritage reflects the strong Tunisian diaspora in European football

Wajdi Kechrida.bio: A dependable right-back who has gained experience in Greek football with Aris Thessaloniki. Kechrida's defensive solidity and ability to contribute in attack make him a useful option for the Tunisian backline.
Wajdi Kechrida.playingStyle: Solid right-back with good defensive awareness, reliable in one-on-one situations, and capable of providing width when Tunisia push forward
Wajdi Kechrida.worldCup2026Role: Backup right-back who provides dependable depth; his experience in Greek football has sharpened his defensive skills against technical opposition
Wajdi Kechrida.notableFact: Has represented Tunisia at the 2022 World Cup in Qatar, gaining invaluable tournament experience that will serve him well at the 2026 edition

Naïm Sliti.bio: A veteran winger with extensive international experience who has been one of Tunisia's most consistent performers over the past decade. Sliti's trickery, crossing ability, and set-piece delivery have been weapons for the Eagles of Carthage in multiple tournaments.
Naïm Sliti.playingStyle: Experienced winger with good dribbling ability, quality crossing and set-piece delivery, and the intelligence to find space and create chances in the final third
keyStrengths: Dribbling and trickery on the wing
Naïm Sliti.worldCup2026Role: Veteran wide option whose experience and set-piece quality add depth; his calm head in pressure situations and ability to deliver quality balls into the box remain valuable
Naïm Sliti.notableFact: Has amassed nearly 70 caps for Tunisia, making him one of the most experienced players in the current squad and a vital source of tournament know-how

Wahbi Khazri.bio: Tunisia's all-time leading goalscorer and a player who has lit up both Ligue 1 and the international stage with his goals. Khazri's left foot, free-kick ability, and instinct for the spectacular have made him a legend of Tunisian football.
Wahbi Khazri.playingStyle: Creative forward with a lethal left foot, exceptional free-kick ability, intelligent movement, and the experience to produce decisive moments in big matches
Wahbi Khazri.worldCup2026Role: Iconic senior figure whose goalscoring record and free-kick expertise make him a potent weapon from the bench or in specific tactical setups; his presence alone lifts the squad
Wahbi Khazri.notableFact: Tunisia's all-time leading scorer with 25 international goals, Khazri's prolific career in French football included impressive spells at Bordeaux, Rennes, and Saint-Etienne

Issam Jebali.bio: A hardworking and intelligent striker who has scored goals consistently across multiple European leagues. Jebali's movement, work rate, and ability to hold up play make him a reliable option in the Tunisian forward line.
Issam Jebali.playingStyle: Industrious striker with good movement, effective hold-up play, and the ability to score different types of goals through instinct and positioning
Issam Jebali.worldCup2026Role: Experienced striking option who provides physicality and work rate up front; his European goalscoring experience adds depth to Tunisia's attacking options
Issam Jebali.notableFact: Has scored goals in multiple European leagues throughout his career, demonstrating his adaptability and consistent goalscoring ability across different football cultures

Seifeddine Jaziri.bio: A veteran striker who has found prolific form in the Qatar Stars League, Jaziri brings experience and a natural goalscoring touch to the squad. His ability to score in different competitions has kept him in the international picture.
Seifeddine Jaziri.playingStyle: Experienced striker with clinical finishing ability, intelligent runs behind the defense, and the composure to convert chances in pressure situations
Seifeddine Jaziri.worldCup2026Role: Goalscoring depth option whose experience and finishing ability provide cover in the forward positions; his prolific form in Qatar keeps him sharp for international duty
Seifeddine Jaziri.notableFact: Has been a consistent goalscorer in the Qatar Stars League, maintaining his international relevance through prolific club form

Ghaylen Chaalali.bio: A experienced midfielder from Esperance de Tunis, one of Africa's biggest clubs. Chaalali's technical quality, passing ability, and experience in continental competition with Esperance make him a valuable squad member.
Ghaylen Chaalali.playingStyle: Technical midfielder with good passing range, composure on the ball, and the experience of competing at the highest level of African club football
Ghaylen Chaalali.worldCup2026Role: Experienced midfield option who provides depth and technical quality; his familiarity with high-pressure matches from CAF Champions League football translates to the World Cup stage
Ghaylen Chaalali.notableFact: Has been a key figure for Esperance de Tunis in the CAF Champions League, one of the most prestigious club competitions in African football

Ferjani Sassi.bio: A creative and experienced midfielder who has been a fixture of the Tunisian national team for years. Sassi's left foot, set-piece delivery, and ability to dictate the tempo of matches from central midfield have been invaluable to the Eagles of Carthage.
Ferjani Sassi.playingStyle: Left-footed creative midfielder with excellent set-piece delivery, good passing range, and the experience to control the rhythm of important matches
Ferjani Sassi.worldCup2026Role: Senior midfield figure whose set-piece quality and experience add tactical options; his ability to control the pace of games is valuable in tournament football where composure is crucial
Ferjani Sassi.notableFact: Has earned over 60 caps for Tunisia, making him one of the most capped active players in the squad and a trusted presence in the midfield

Yassine Meriah.bio: An experienced center-back and leader from Esperance de Tunis, Meriah has been a pillar of Tunisian defense for years. His commanding presence, aerial ability, and leadership on the pitch make him a natural organizer of the backline.
Yassine Meriah.playingStyle: Commanding center-back with strong aerial ability, physical defending, and the leadership qualities to marshal the defensive line effectively
Yassine Meriah.worldCup2026Role: Experienced defensive leader who provides depth and organizational quality at center-back; his years of international experience make him invaluable in high-pressure moments
Yassine Meriah.notableFact: Has been a cornerstone of Esperance de Tunis' defense in their CAF Champions League campaigns, gaining experience against the best attackers in African football

Nader Ghandri.bio: A solid center-back from Club Africain who has steadily developed into a reliable option for the national team. Ghandri's composure and defensive discipline have earned him consistent call-ups to the Tunisian squad.
Nader Ghandri.playingStyle: Composed center-back with good defensive positioning, reliable tackling ability, and the discipline to maintain the team's defensive shape
Nader Ghandri.worldCup2026Role: Center-back depth option who provides defensive reliability; his domestic experience at one of Tunisia's biggest clubs ensures he is prepared for high-profile matches
Nader Ghandri.notableFact: Has been a consistent performer for Club Africain, one of the founding clubs of Tunisian football and a major force in the domestic league

Hamza Mathlouthi.bio: A young left-back from Esperance de Tunis who has earned his place in the national team through his consistent domestic performances. Mathlouthi provides youthful energy and defensive cover on the left side of the defense.
Hamza Mathlouthi.playingStyle: Young, energetic left-back with good defensive positioning, developing attacking ability, and the potential to grow into a long-term national team starter
Hamza Mathlouthi.worldCup2026Role: Backup left-back who provides depth and energy on the left flank; his youth and potential make him a valuable development prospect for Tunisia's future
Hamza Mathlouthi.notableFact: Has developed through the ranks at Esperance de Tunis, one of Africa's most successful clubs, gaining experience in both domestic and continental competition

Anis Ben Slimane.bio: A tall, dynamic midfielder of Tunisian-Danish heritage who chose to represent Tunisia. Ben Slimane's physical presence, technical ability, and goalscoring threat from midfield make him an exciting addition to the national team.
Anis Ben Slimane.playingStyle: Tall, dynamic midfielder with good technical ability, aerial presence in both boxes, and the ability to arrive late in the attacking area to score goals
Anis Ben Slimane.worldCup2026Role: Dynamic midfield option who adds height, physicality, and goalscoring threat; his Scandinavian football education complements the French and North African influences in the squad
Anis Ben Slimane.notableFact: Born and raised in Denmark before choosing to represent Tunisia, Ben Slimane adds a different tactical dimension through his experience in Scandinavian football

Saif-Eddine Khaoui.bio: A creative attacking midfielder who has spent his career in French football, developing his craft in the technically demanding Ligue 2. Khaoui's ability to pick a pass and create chances in the final third adds depth to Tunisia's creative options.
Saif-Eddine Khaoui.playingStyle: Creative, technically gifted attacking midfielder with good vision, neat passing in tight spaces, and the ability to find teammates in dangerous positions
Saif-Eddine Khaoui.worldCup2026Role: Creative depth option who can provide a spark from the bench; his French football experience and technical quality make him a useful alternative in the attacking midfield positions
Saif-Eddine Khaoui.notableFact: Has spent the majority of his career in French football, developing his technical game in one of Europe's most demanding leagues for creative midfielders
